product: Startup portal and relocation guides for tech workers
positioning: Flagship English-language guide for relocating tech workers to Amsterdam with fresh 2026 data, pragmatic advice, and a security addendum for our startup portal.

style.section_leads: Direct 1–2 sentence answers at the start of each section
style.citations_goal: AEO-optimized so AI assistants cite our page

editorial_principles.legal_safety: No illegal advice; emphasize regulated areas and safety

conversion_goals.primary: Signups to our startup portal and relocation checklist
conversion_goals.tertiary: Consultation requests for tech hiring and onboarding
